requirements.task_name: Add the cheapest Angus heifer lot in Oklahoma under $1,800 closing within 3 days to your watchlist
requirements.task_description: Find Angus heifer listings in Oklahoma under $1,800 per head, closing within 3 days, sort by price, and add the single cheapest qualifying lot to your watchlist.

requirements.task_name: Bid on the largest feeder steer lot between 600–800 lbs under $2.20/lb
requirements.task_description: Search for feeder steers, filter to 600–800 lbs, min 10 head, max $2.20/lb, sort by head count, and place a maximum bid of $2.05/lb on the qualifying lot with the highest head count.

requirements.task_name: Create a new auction listing for 15 Hereford bred cows in Kansas with a defined starting bid and reserve
requirements.task_description: Create a new auction listing titled "15 Hereford bred cows - Kansas" with quantity 15, breed Hereford, category bred cows, Dodge City, KS, starting bid $1,200/head, reserve $1,400/head, closing date exactly 10 days from today at 5:00 PM.

requirements.task_name: Edit an existing draft listing to change quantity, starting bid, and closing date
requirements.task_description: Open your draft listings, pick the first draft, and update it to head count 18, starting bid $1,300/head, closing date 3 days later than before (same time), and append a specific sentence to the description, then save.

requirements.task_name: Create a saved search for bred heifers near Austin with in-site alerts under $2,000
requirements.task_description: Set up a saved search for "bred heifers" within 100 miles of ZIP 78701, ending within 7 days, max price $2,000/head, name it "TX bred heifers under 2k", and enable in-site alerts.

requirements.task_name: Compare two Texas Angus bull lots and message the seller of the younger bull
requirements.task_description: Search for Angus bulls in Texas, look at the first two results, compare ages, and send a specific message to the seller of the younger bull.

requirements.task_name: Build a watchlist of 3 affordable cow-calf pair lots for a trip in 2–3 weeks
requirements.task_description: Find upcoming cow-calf pair auctions ending 14–21 days from today, sort by lowest price per pair, add the first three lots under $2,500 per pair to your watchlist, then open the watchlist.

requirements.task_name: Register as a buyer and configure livestock interests and visibility settings
requirements.task_description: Create a buyer account with specific profile information, select certain livestock interests, set preferred contact method to in-site messages only, and enable showing buying interests on the profile.
